content.json:
# 🛡️ SOC Threat Monitoring Dashboard
### Azure Honeypot Environment

| Component | Description |
|---|---|
| SIEM Platform | Microsoft Sentinel |
| Honeypot Services | RDP (Windows VM), SSH (Linux VM) |
| Data Sources | SecurityEvent (Windows), Syslog (Linux) |
| Purpose | Monitor and visualize brute-force activity targeting exposed honeypot services |

---

content.query:
let GeoIPDB_FULL = _GetWatchlist("geoip");

let WindowsEvents = SecurityEvent
| where EventID == 4625
| where IpAddress !in ("-","127.0.0.1")
| project TimeGenerated, Computer, IpAddress
| evaluate ipv4_lookup(GeoIPDB_FULL, IpAddress, network);

let LinuxEvents = Syslog
| where SyslogMessage contains "Failed password"
| extend IpAddress = extract(@"\\d+\\.\\d+\\.\\d+\\.\\d+",0,SyslogMessage)
| where isnotempty(IpAddress)
| project TimeGenerated, Computer, IpAddress
| evaluate ipv4_lookup(GeoIPDB_FULL, IpAddress, network);

union WindowsEvents, LinuxEvents
| where not(ipv4_is_private(IpAddress))
| where isnotempty(latitude) and isnotempty(longitude)
| summarize AttackCount=count(), Targets=make_set(Computer,5)
by IpAddress, latitude, longitude, cityname, countryname
| extend Location=strcat(cityname," (",countryname,")")
| project AttackCount, IpAddress, latitude, longitude, Location
content.title: Global Attack Map

content.query:
let GeoIPDB_FULL = _GetWatchlist("geoip");
union (
SecurityEvent
| where EventID == 4625
| project TimeGenerated, IpAddress
),(
Syslog
| where SyslogMessage contains "Failed password"
| extend IpAddress = extract(@"\\d+\\.\\d+\\.\\d+\\.\\d+",0,SyslogMessage)
| project TimeGenerated, IpAddress
)
| evaluate ipv4_lookup(GeoIPDB_FULL, IpAddress, network)
| summarize Attacks=count()
by bin(TimeGenerated,5m)
| render timechart
content.title: Attack Timeline

content.query:
let GeoIPDB_FULL = _GetWatchlist("geoip");
union (
SecurityEvent
| where EventID == 4625
| project IpAddress
),(
Syslog
| where SyslogMessage contains "Failed password"
| extend IpAddress = extract(@"\\d+\\.\\d+\\.\\d+\\.\\d+",0,SyslogMessage)
| project IpAddress
)
| evaluate ipv4_lookup(GeoIPDB_FULL, IpAddress, network)
| where not(ipv4_is_private(IpAddress))
| summarize Attacks=count() by countryname
| order by Attacks desc
| render barchart
content.title: Top Attacker Countries

content.query:
let Win = SecurityEvent
| where EventID == 4625
| summarize Count=count() | extend Service="RDP";

let Lin = Syslog
| where SyslogMessage contains "Failed password"
| summarize Count=count() | extend Service="SSH";

union Win, Lin
| render piechart
content.title: Attack Distribution by Service

content.query:
let GeoIPDB_FULL = _GetWatchlist("geoip");
union (
SecurityEvent
| where EventID == 4625
| project IpAddress
),(
Syslog
| where SyslogMessage contains "Failed password"
| extend IpAddress = extract(@"\\d+\\.\\d+\\.\\d+\\.\\d+",0,SyslogMessage)
| project IpAddress
)
| evaluate ipv4_lookup(GeoIPDB_FULL, IpAddress, network)
| where not(ipv4_is_private(IpAddress))
| summarize Attacks=count()
by IpAddress, countryname, cityname
| top 10 by Attacks
content.title: Top Attacker IP

content.query:
union (
SecurityEvent
| where EventID == 4625
| project Account
),(
Syslog
| where SyslogMessage contains "Failed password"
| extend Account = extract("Failed password for (\\w+)",1,SyslogMessage)
| project Account
)
| summarize Attempts=count() by Account
| top 10 by Attempts
| render barchart
content.title: Most Targeted Accounts
